gaps: No test covers the scenario where Voice Prompts & Tones settings changed on a PC (via Poly Lens desktop app or similar) are propagated/synced to the Poly Studio Mobile Android app on a Free20 device.
No test covers cross-platform settings synchronization from PC to Android for Voice Prompts & Tones specifically.
No test covers the direction of settings propagation from a non-mobile device (PC) to the Poly Studio Mobile app.
No test covers Voice Prompts & Tones settings at all — none of the existing test cases reference Voice Prompts, Tones, or any audio notification settings.
No test covers settings synchronization between connected devices (PC vs mobile) for the Free20 headset model specifically.

generated_testcases.title: TC-VPT-001: Voice Prompts language change on PC propagates to Poly Studio Mobile app on Free20
steps: 1. Factory reset the Poly Free20 headset.
2. Pair and connect Free20 to a Windows PC via Bluetooth (using Poly Lens desktop app).
3. Pair and connect the same Free20 to an Android device running Poly Studio Mobile app.
4. On the PC, open Poly Lens desktop app → navigate to Device Settings → Voice Prompts & Tones.
5. Change Voice Prompts language from default (e.g., English) to a different language (e.g., French or German).
6. Apply/save the setting on the PC.
7. Disconnect and reconnect the Free20 from the Android device (toggle Bluetooth off/on on the phone).
8. Open Poly Studio Mobile app on Android → tap [Free20 Device Name] → Audio Settings.
9. Navigate to Voice Prompts & Tones section.
10. Observe the displayed Voice Prompts language setting.
generated_testcases.expected: The Voice Prompts language setting in the Poly Studio Mobile app on Android reflects the language changed on the PC (e.g., shows French/German instead of English). The setting is synchronized from PC to mobile.

generated_testcases.title: TC-VPT-002: Voice Prompts language change on PC persists after app restart on Android
steps: 1. Factory reset the Poly Free20 headset.
2. Pair and connect Free20 to a Windows PC (Poly Lens) and an Android device (Poly Studio Mobile) simultaneously.
3. On PC → Poly Lens → Device Settings → Voice Prompts & Tones → change Voice Prompts language to Spanish.
4. Apply and save on PC.
5. On Android, fully close (force-stop) the Poly Studio Mobile app.
6. Reopen Poly Studio Mobile app → tap [Free20 Device Name] → Audio Settings → Voice Prompts & Tones.
7. Observe the Voice Prompts language setting.
8. Navigate away to the Home screen, then back to Audio Settings → Voice Prompts & Tones.
9. Observe the Voice Prompts language setting again.
generated_testcases.expected: The Voice Prompts language shows Spanish (the PC-set value) after app restart and after navigating away and back. The setting persists across app lifecycle events.

generated_testcases.title: TC-VPT-003: Tones (e.g., Call Alert Tone) changed on PC propagates to Poly Studio Mobile app on Free20
steps: 1. Factory reset the Poly Free20 headset.
2. Pair and connect Free20 to a Windows PC (Poly Lens) and an Android device (Poly Studio Mobile).
3. On PC → Poly Lens → Device Settings → Voice Prompts & Tones → Tones section.
4. Change the Call Alert Tone from default to a different tone (e.g., from 'Tone 1' to 'Tone 3').
5. Apply/save on PC.
6. On Android, open Poly Studio Mobile app → tap [Free20 Device Name] → Audio Settings → Voice Prompts & Tones.
7. Observe the Tones section and the selected Call Alert Tone.
8. Trigger an incoming call on the Android device to verify the tone plays correctly.
generated_testcases.expected: The Call Alert Tone setting in Poly Studio Mobile app shows the tone selected on PC (Tone 3). When an incoming call arrives, the headset plays the new tone (Tone 3), confirming the setting is synchronized and functional.

generated_testcases.title: TC-VPT-004: Voice Prompts & Tones settings changed on PC propagate after Bluetooth reconnection cycle on Free20
steps: 1. Factory reset the Poly Free20 headset.
2. Pair and connect Free20 to a Windows PC (Poly Lens) and an Android device (Poly Studio Mobile).
3. On PC → Poly Lens → Device Settings → Voice Prompts & Tones → set Voice Prompts to 'Off' (disabled).
4. Apply/save on PC.
5. On Android, disconnect Bluetooth from the Free20 (Settings → Bluetooth → tap Forget/Disconnect).
6. Wait 10 seconds, then reconnect the Free20 to the Android device.
7. Open Poly Studio Mobile app → tap [Free20 Device Name] → Audio Settings → Voice Prompts & Tones.
8. Observe the Voice Prompts toggle/status.
9. On PC → Poly Lens → change Voice Prompts back to 'On' and set language to Italian.
10. Apply/save on PC.
11. On Android, disconnect and reconnect Bluetooth again.
12. Open Poly Studio Mobile app → Audio Settings → Voice Prompts & Tones and observe the setting.
generated_testcases.expected: After each Bluetooth reconnection cycle, the Poly Studio Mobile app reflects the Voice Prompts & Tones settings last saved on the PC. Step 8 shows Voice Prompts 'Off'. Step 12 shows Voice Prompts 'On' with language Italian.

generated_testcases.title: TC-VPT-005: Voice Prompts & Tones settings changed on PC propagate after Android app force-kill and relaunch on Free20
steps: 1. Factory reset the Poly Free20 headset.
2. Pair and connect Free20 to a Windows PC (Poly Lens) and an Android device (Poly Studio Mobile).
3. On PC → Poly Lens → Device Settings → Voice Prompts & Tones → set 'Voice Prompts' to 'On' and language to 'Portuguese'.
4. Apply/save on PC.
5. On Android, force-stop the Poly Studio Mobile app (App Info → Force Stop).
6. Reopen Poly Studio Mobile app → tap [Free20 Device Name] → Audio Settings → Voice Prompts & Tones.
7. Observe the Voice Prompts language.
8. On PC → Poly Lens → change Voice Prompts language to 'Dutch'.
9. Apply/save on PC.
10. On Android, force-stop the Poly Studio Mobile app again.
11. Reopen Poly Studio Mobile app → Audio Settings → Voice Prompts & Tones.
12. Observe the Voice Prompts language setting.
generated_testcases.expected: After each force-stop and relaunch, the Poly Studio Mobile app displays the Voice Prompts language last set on the PC (Step 7: Portuguese, Step 12: Dutch). The app correctly reads the device-stored setting on each launch.

generated_testcases.title: TC-VPT-006: Voice Prompts & Tones settings changed on PC propagate to Android when Free20 is connected to PC first, then Android
steps: 1. Factory reset the Poly Free20 headset.
2. Pair and connect Free20 to a Windows PC (Poly Lens) ONLY — do not connect to Android yet.
3. On PC → Poly Lens → Device Settings → Voice Prompts & Tones → set Voice Prompts to 'Off'.
4. Apply/save on PC.
5. Disconnect Free20 from PC (turn off Bluetooth on PC or disconnect the device).
6. Pair and connect Free20 to an Android device.
7. Open Poly Studio Mobile app → tap [Free20 Device Name] → Audio Settings → Voice Prompts & Tones.
8. Observe the Voice Prompts toggle/status.
9. On PC → reconnect Free20 → Poly Lens → change Voice Prompts to 'On' with language 'Japanese'.
10. Apply/save on PC.
11. Disconnect Free20 from PC.
12. On Android, disconnect and reconnect Bluetooth to Free20.
13. Open Poly Studio Mobile app → Audio Settings → Voice Prompts & Tones and observe the setting.
generated_testcases.expected: Step 8: Voice Prompts shows 'Off' (set on PC before first Android connection). Step 13: Voice Prompts shows 'On' with language 'Japanese'. Settings propagate from PC to device and are read correctly by the Android app.

generated_testcases.title: TC-VPT-007: Multiple Voice Prompts & Tones settings changed on PC all propagate to Android app on Free20
steps: 1. Factory reset the Poly Free20 headset.
2. Pair and connect Free20 to a Windows PC (Poly Lens) and an Android device (Poly Studio Mobile).
3. On PC → Poly Lens → Device Settings → Voice Prompts & Tones, make the following changes:
a. Set Voice Prompts to 'On'
b. Set Voice Prompts Language to 'Korean'
c. Set Call Alert Tone to 'Tone 2'
d. Set Low Battery Alert to 'Off'
e. Set Connection Tone to 'Off'
4. Apply/save all settings on PC.
5. On Android, open Poly Studio Mobile app → tap [Free20 Device Name] → Audio Settings → Voice Prompts & Tones.
6. Observe and record each setting value displayed.
7. Navigate away from the app (Home button), then return to the same screen.
8. Observe and record each setting value again.
generated_testcases.expected: All five Voice Prompts & Tones settings changed on PC (Voice Prompts On, Language Korean, Call Alert Tone 2, Low Battery Alert Off, Connection Tone Off) are correctly displayed in the Poly Studio Mobile app on Android. Values persist after navigating away and back.

generated_testcases.title: TC-VPT-008: Voice Prompts & Tones settings changed on PC propagate to Android after phone reboot on Free20
steps: 1. Factory reset the Poly Free20 headset.
2. Pair and connect Free20 to a Windows PC (Poly Lens) and an Android device (Poly Studio Mobile).
3. On PC → Poly Lens → Device Settings → Voice Prompts & Tones → set Voice Prompts language to 'Russian'.
4. Apply/save on PC.
5. On Android, reboot the phone completely.
6. After phone restarts, ensure Bluetooth is enabled.
7. Wait for Free20 to auto-reconnect to the Android device (or manually pair if needed).
8. Open Poly Studio Mobile app → tap [Free20 Device Name] → Audio Settings → Voice Prompts & Tones.
9. Observe the Voice Prompts language setting.
10. On PC → Poly Lens → change Voice Prompts language to 'Swedish'.
11. Apply/save on PC.
12. On Android, reboot the phone again.
13. After restart, reconnect Free20, open Poly Studio Mobile app → Audio Settings → Voice Prompts & Tones.
14. Observe the Voice Prompts language setting.
generated_testcases.expected: After each phone reboot, the Poly Studio Mobile app displays the Voice Prompts language last set on the PC (Step 9: Russian, Step 14: Swedish). The setting survives phone reboot and is read from the device.

generated_testcases.title: TC-VPT-009: Voice Prompts & Tones settings changed on PC propagate to Android when Free20 is connected to both devices simultaneously (multi-point)
steps: 1. Factory reset the Poly Free20 headset.
2. Pair and connect Free20 to a Windows PC (Poly Lens) — keep connected.
3. Pair and connect the same Free20 to an Android device (Poly Studio Mobile) — both connected simultaneously (multi-point).
4. On PC → Poly Lens → Device Settings → Voice Prompts & Tones → set Voice Prompts to 'Off'.
5. Apply/save on PC while Free20 is still connected to both devices.
6. Without disconnecting anything, open Poly Studio Mobile app on Android → tap [Free20 Device Name] → Audio Settings → Voice Prompts & Tones.
7. Observe the Voice Prompts setting.
8. On PC → Poly Lens → change Voice Prompts back to 'On' with language 'Chinese (Simplified)'.
9. Apply/save on PC while both connections are active.
10. On Android, navigate away from Voice Prompts screen and back, then observe the setting again.
11. Close Poly Studio Mobile app, reopen, and observe the setting.
generated_testcases.expected: While Free20 is connected to both PC and Android simultaneously, Voice Prompts & Tones settings changed on PC propagate to the device and are reflected in the Poly Studio Mobile app. Step 7 shows 'Off'. Steps 10-11 show 'On' with language 'Chinese (Simplified)'.

generated_testcases.title: TC-VPT-010: Voice Prompts & Tones settings changed on PC propagate to Android after factory reset of Free20
steps: 1. Factory reset the Poly Free20 headset.
2. Pair and connect Free20 to a Windows PC (Poly Lens).
3. On PC → Poly Lens → Device Settings → Voice Prompts & Tones → set Voice Prompts to 'On', language to 'French', Call Alert Tone to 'Tone 3'.
4. Apply/save on PC.
5. Disconnect Free20 from PC.
6. Pair and connect Free20 to an Android device.
7. Open Poly Studio Mobile app → Audio Settings → Voice Prompts & Tones → verify settings show French, Tone 3.
8. Factory reset the Free20 headset again (while still paired to Android).
9. On Android, disconnect and reconnect Bluetooth to Free20.
10. Open Poly Studio Mobile app → Audio Settings → Voice Prompts & Tones → observe the settings (should be factory defaults).
11. Pair and connect Free20 to PC again.
12. On PC → Poly Lens → set Voice Prompts to 'On', language to 'German', Call Alert Tone to 'Tone 1'.
13. Apply/save on PC.
14. Disconnect Free20 from PC, reconnect to Android.
15. Open Poly Studio Mobile app → Audio Settings → Voice Prompts & Tones → observe the settings.
generated_testcases.expected: Step 7: Settings show French/Tone 3 (propagated from PC). Step 10: Settings show factory defaults after reset. Step 15: Settings show German/Tone 1 (re-propagated from PC after factory reset). The propagation works correctly even after a factory reset cycle.
